title: schradera glabriflora
intro: Schradera glabriflora, also known as the Smooth-flowered Schradera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Schradera glabriflora is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and the leaves and stems are used in traditional herbal preparations to treat various ailments.
